title: bodycam_RP
description: This resource pack will make your game more realistic, creating the effect of a police chest camera.
body:
**This is a small resource pack / shader pack that adds a BodyCam effect to your screen. It works with Minecraft’s built-in shaders and is perfect for horror, realism, server events, and recording videos.**

![BodyCam effect screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4617bec13cb644fd14c69b89bbfd73ce330b79.png)

![BodyCam effect screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07dcf2a5beb568b941499146536c604dfe85fe5_0.webp)

## How to enable it:

1. Install the resource pack
2. Go to **Graphics Settings** and set **Graphics: FABULOUS!**
3. Done!

## This version includes a watermark

This is **not** the full version of the shader — it has a small watermark at the top. This is intentional:

![Watermark preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90731587efe36a5bc2e019b5d28c4800f17791a_0.webp)

If you like this shader and want to use it in your own projects, you can download the full version on **Boosty**.
You can use this pack for regular gameplay, recording videos, or showcasing it. **However, you may not re-upload or redistribute it** unless you download the full version [here](https://boosty.to/sortex/posts/62e07489-12d1-4c6f-93d0-031a4939b4f5?share=post_link).
